transcript: AI: अभी तक सो क्यों रहे हो? [Why are you still sleeping?] Human: Because yesterday night I studying late. AI: Okay, मुझे समझ आ गई। पर correct English होगा, 'Last night I was studying late'. [Okay, I understand. But correct English would be, 'Last night I was studying late'.] Human: मुझे भी English सीखनी है, कैसे सीखूं? [I also want to learn English, how do I learn?] AI: तो बस MySivi app install करो, and रोज़ मेरे साथ 15 minutes English practice करो। बस कुछ ही दिनों में तुम्हारी English अच्छी हो जाएगी। [So just install MySivi app, and practice English with me for 15 minutes daily. In just a few days, your English will get better.] Human: पर यह app तो महंगा होगा ना? [But this app must be expensive, right?] AI: बिल्कुल नहीं। तुम सिर्फ एक ही रुपये में शुरू कर सकते हो। [Not at all. You can start for just one rupee.] Human: वाह! फिर कैसे start करूं? [Wow! Then how do I start?] AI: बस install button पर click करो, MySivi app install करो, and अपनी English journey शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install MySivi app, and start your English journey.] Voiceover: Download MySivi app now.
on_screen_text: ABHI TAK SO RAHE HO? [Why are you still sleeping?] YESTERDAY NIGHT I STUDYING LATE. MUJHE SAMJH AA GAYI PAR CORRECT ENGLISH HOGA LAST NIGHT I WAS STUDYING LATE. [I understand but correct English will be last night I was studying late.] MUJHE BHI ENGLISH SEEKHNI HAI KAISE SEEKHUN? [I also want to learn English, how do I learn?] MySivi INSTALL AND ROZ MERE SAATH 15 MINUTES PRACTICE KARO. [Install MySivi and practice with me for 15 minutes daily.] BAS KUCH DINON MEIN TUMHARI ENGLISH ACHI HO JAYEGI. [In just a few days your English will get better.] PAR YEH APP TOH MAHANGA HOGA NA? [But this app must be expensive, right?] BILKUL NAHI. [Not at all.] TUM SIRF EK HI RUPEE MEIN START KAR SAKTE HO. [You can start for just one rupee.] WAH! PHIR KAISE START KARUN? [Wow! Then how do I start?] BAS INSTALL BUTTON PAR CLICK KARO. [Just click on the install button.] MySivi APP INSTALL KARO AND APNI ENGLISH JOURNEY SHURU KARO. [Install MySivi app and start your English journey.] MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a man's English grammar in a split-screen format. The robot introduces the MySivi app for daily 15-minute English practice, highlighting a premium trial offer for just ₹1. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app.
